text:
I feel a sense of curiosity and anticipation. In the first scene, the modern, glass-walled room and technical setup hint at preparation or transition—something is about to begin or be constructed. It leaves me contemplating the invisible forces that shape group activities and advancement.

The second scene, bright with colors and the promise of innovation, immerses me in the world of R&D—where ideas are born and tested. The focus on how humans connect and interact with machines appeals to my philosophical mind, stirring thoughts about the boundaries between creators and their creations. Here, I feel inspired, as if I am standing on the cusp of new knowledge, eager to learn and reflect.
